# This file exists when prettier is non-idempotent on output_prettier.* — it pins

%%PASS=2%%
<script>
	switch (x) {
		// inline after colon
		case 'a': {
			// comment
			fn();
			break;
		}
		// own line between label and block
		case 'b': { // comment
			fn();
			break;
		}
	}
</script>

%%PASS=3 (fixed point)%%
<script>
	switch (x) {
		// inline after colon
		case 'a': {
			// comment
			fn();
			break;
		}
		// own line between label and block
		case 'b': {
			// comment
			fn();
			break;
		}
	}
</script>
